column1: We __________ together but then Melissa went to another school.
John ___________ on foot but then he bought a car.
Leigh and Meigh ____________ secrets but then they argued.
Tom __________ Jerry but then they became friends.
She ___________ badly but then she became a good singer.
My brother ___________ all day but then he changed his schedule.
My teacher ___________ that I was a bad student but then I became the best student.
